title: Delete ...
text: Delete ... Specify whether Uniface deletes spaces, zeros, or control characters before the characters entered in the field. Table 1. Data Clean-Up Options Field Action Leading Spaces Delete spaces before the first non-space character. (True = DLS , False = NDLS ) Leading Zeros Delete zeros before the first nonzero character. (True = DLZ , False = NDLZ ) Leading Control Delete non-printing control characters before the first non-control character in the data, except for carriage returns, form feeds, line feeds, tabs and vertical tabs. (True = DLC , False = NDLC ) Control Delete carriage returns, form feeds, line feeds, tabs and vertical tabs, wherever they are in the data. (True = YDCC , False = NDCC ) Text Control Delete non-printing control characters except for carriage returns, form feeds, line feeds, tabs and vertical tabs, wherever they are in the data. (True = YDCX , False = NDCX ) Trailing Control Delete non-printing control characters after the last non-control character in the data, except for carriage returns, form feeds, line feeds, tabs and vertical tabs. (True = DTC , False = NDTC ) Applies To Field Syntax Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
